quickActions.title: Créer automatisation
quickActions.description: Ouvre la vue Automatisations sur le panneau de création.

tools.name: automation.schedule_task
tools.label: Schedule automation task
tools.description: Create or update an automation rule that schedules a recurring or event-driven task for the user.
tools.promptSnippet: Program a user automation task by creating an automation rule.
promptGuidelines: Use this tool when the user asks to program, schedule, or automate a recurring task.
Always provide a clear human-readable rule name and the task instruction to run.

trigger.description: Trigger topic, e.g. conversation.created or conversation.message.received.

modelKey.description: Optional provider/model key to store with the task.

tools.name: automation.list_scheduled_tasks
tools.label: List scheduled automation tasks
tools.description: List existing automation rules so the LLM can inspect already programmed tasks before creating or updating one.

tools.name: create_task_list
tools.label: Create task list
tools.description: Create a task list displayed in the side panel to break down complex work into visible steps. Each task starts as pending. The panel opens automatically.
tools.promptSnippet: Display a task list in the side panel to track multi-step work.
promptGuidelines: Use this tool when the user request involves multiple distinct steps that benefit from visual tracking.
Do NOT use it for simple, single-step requests.
Keep task titles short and actionable.
Order tasks in the sequence you plan to execute them.
After creating the list, update each task status as you progress using update_task_status.

title.description: Title of the task list (e.g. "Implementing authentication")
Short actionable title for the task

tools.name: update_task_status
tools.label: Update task status
tools.description: Update the status of a task in the side panel task list. Call this as you start or finish each task.
tools.promptSnippet: Update a task status in the side panel (pending, in-progress, completed, error).
promptGuidelines: Set a task to in-progress when you begin working on it.
Set a task to completed when it is done.
Set a task to error only if it genuinely failed.
You must reference the exact taskId returned by create_task_list.

taskId.description: The ID of the task to update (returned by create_task_list)

errorMessage.description: Error description when status is error

tools.name: display_action_suggestions
tools.label: Display action suggestions
tools.description: Display a choice menu of action badges in the composer for the user to click. Useful for guiding users through decisions without requiring typed input.
tools.promptSnippet: Display suggested actions as clickable badges in the composer.
promptGuidelines: Use this tool to present multiple options to the user as a choice menu.
Keep labels short (max 30 chars) and action messages concise.
Limit suggestions to 4 or fewer for good UI layout.
Each action message should be a complete instruction or question the user would enter.

suggestions.description: Array of action suggestions to display (max 4 for UI fit)

message.description: The message to send when user clicks this action

id.description: Optional unique ID for this suggestion (auto-generated if omitted)

tools.name: register_subagent
tools.label: Register subagent
tools.description: Register a subagent in the side panel so the conversation can track delegated work in a dedicated section.
tools.promptSnippet: Register a subagent before or when it starts delegated work.
promptGuidelines: Use this when you delegate meaningful work to a subagent.
Provide a stable subAgentId so later updates target the same subagent.
Keep the label short and human readable.

description.description: Optional short description of the delegated work

tools.name: update_subagent_status
tools.label: Update subagent status
tools.description: Update a registered subagent status in the side panel.
tools.promptSnippet: Update a subagent status in the side panel.
promptGuidelines: Set status to running when the subagent starts work.
Set status to completed when the subagent finishes.
Set status to error only when the delegated work genuinely failed.

errorMessage.description: Optional error details when status is error

tools.name: set_subagent_task_list
tools.label: Set subagent task list
tools.description: Create or replace the task list displayed under a registered subagent in the side panel.
tools.promptSnippet: Set a task list for a registered subagent.
promptGuidelines: Use this after registering a subagent when its delegated work has multiple steps.
Replace the whole list when you need to redefine the subagent plan.
Task titles should be short and actionable.

tasks.description: List of tasks to display for this subagent

tools.name: update_subagent_task_status
tools.label: Update subagent task status
tools.description: Update the status of a task inside a registered subagent task list.
tools.promptSnippet: Update a task status for a registered subagent.
promptGuidelines: Use the exact taskId returned by set_subagent_task_list.
Set tasks to running when work begins and completed when finished.
Use error only when the task genuinely failed.

taskId.description: The task identifier returned by set_subagent_task_list

errorMessage.description: Optional error details when status is error

tools.name: get_access_mode
tools.label: Get access mode
tools.description: Return the current conversation access mode so the agent can verify whether filesystem access is secure or open.
tools.promptSnippet: Check the current conversation access mode.

tools.name: get_commands
tools.label: Get runtime commands
tools.description: Return the list of runtime commands supported by the current conversation session.
tools.promptSnippet: List the currently supported runtime commands.
